text:
Owner-curated Shibari Supply bamboo resource
The supplied directory recommends Shibari Supply for bamboo sold for suspension use: https://shibarisupply.com/.
The inspected product page describes hand-selected, node-to-node, flame-cured bamboo in nominal lengths from four to eight feet. Because it is natural material, the vendor says diameter is approximate at about 4 to 4.4 inches, length may vary by a few inches, and each pole may taper. The vendor explicitly makes no guarantee of the bamboo's safety, suitability, or longevity for any purpose.
title: Owner-curated Shibari Supply bamboo resource
